title: koeleria hirsuta
intro: Koeleria hirsuta, also known as hairy June grass, is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Koeleria hirsuta include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Koeleria hirsuta can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
